text: Confidence is not something you are born with. It's something you build. One step at a time. Every time you face a challenge, instead of avoiding it, you grow stronger, stronger. Strong as... Strong as... Strong as... Every time you speak up, when it feels uncomfortable, you become more fearless. People often wait to feel ready before they act, but the truth is clarity and confidence comes after you take action, not before. So instead of waiting for the perfect moment, start now. Start small.
